The '''Battle of Drongar''', also known as the '''Jasserak Engagement''', was fought during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] was not a strategic military point; instead, both the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] wished to control the planet's main export, [[Bota/Legends|bota]]. Both sides of the war fought for the planet over one year already as of [[20 BBY/Legends|24th]] month after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], but used weapons like [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrowers]], swords, and staffs to make sure the plants weren't damaged.

==The battle==
[[22 BBY/Legends|Seven]] [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle]] of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], Republic forces were in need of reinforcements. The [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] ''[[VCD987]]'' was [[Mission to Drongar|dispatched]] with a fresh detachment of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]], [[Sian Jeisel]], and [[Kai Justiss]]. En route, the Republic cruiser was ambushed by [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] Separatists loyal to [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. With its engines disabled, Dooku and [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]] led the Quarren soldiers in a boarding action. After securing the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], Bulq was ordered to slay the surviving clone troopers, cutting off reinforcements to [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]].<ref name="Count Dooku" />

Meanwhile, on the ground, [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] aided a small surgical unit, saving countless lives during the ensuing battle. Eventually, the overall strength of the droid fighting force was enough to have Republic troops pulled off the planet (which was also due to the fact that Separatists had used saturation bombing which rendered the majority of the bota useless). However, the Republic managed to secure about two metric tons of bota, and they were eventually supported by the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Resolution (Venator-class)|''Resolution'']], which forced the droid armies into a retreat.<ref name="Jedi Healer">''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]''</ref>
